Confusion about two John Porters married about the same time
memoryArtifacts.description:
John Porter married Anna White. Not to be confused with the John Porter who married Margaret Odding about the same time.
This image is taken from Torrey's "New England Marriages Prior to 1700"

popularStory.headline: John Porter
popularStory.description: John Porter, son of John Porter (1560 - 1625) and Sybil Vessey (1561 - 1625), was baptized on 21 June 1594 in Holy Cross Church, Felsted, Essex, England. He died on 21 April 1648 in Windsor, Hartford …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Porter of Windsor Connecticut於1594年6月出生在英國艾可費爾斯泰德時，他的父親John Porter31歲，母親Sybil Vessey32歲。他於1620年10月18日與Anna White在英國艾可梅希結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵住了大約9年。他於1639年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵被列為appointed constable。他去世於1648年4月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵享年53歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Porter of Windsor Connecticut于1594年6月出生在英国艾可費爾斯泰德时，他的父亲John Porter31岁，母亲Sybil Vessey32岁。他于1620年10月18日与Anna White在英国艾可梅希结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵住了大约9年。他于1639年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵被列为appointed constable。他去世于1648年4月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德溫莎女爵享年53岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Porter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for the gatekeeper of a walled town or city, or the doorkeeper of a great house, castle, or monastery, from Middle English and Older Scots porter(e), port(o)ur ‘doorkeeper, gatekeeper’ (Anglo-Norman French port(i)er, portur, Latin portarius). The office often came with accommodation, lands, and other privileges for the bearer, and in some cases was hereditary, especially in the case of a royal castle. The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates and equivalents in other languages, for example German Pförtner (see Fortner ) and Poertner .

English: occupational name for a man who carried loads for a living, especially one who used his own muscle power rather than a beast of burden or a wheeled vehicle. This sense is from Middle English port(o)ur, porter ‘porter, carrier of burdens’ (Anglo-Norman French portur, porteo(u)r).
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized, of Poorter, status name for a freeman (burgher) of a town, Middle Dutch portere, modern Dutch poorter. Compare De Porter .

variants.name: Porterfield
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English porter(e) ‘gatekeeper, doorkeeper’ + feld ‘open country, bounded piece of land’, referring to the hereditary lands owned by a porter of a monastery (see Porter 1), taken as a surname by the descendants of such an official. Black suggests that they would originally have been known as Porter but extended their name when ‘territorial surnames’ became fashionable.

variants.name: Sluiter
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a porter or gatekeeper, Middle Dutch sluter. Compare English Porter .

variants.name: Port
meanings: English: from Middle English port(e) ‘gateway, entrance’ (Old French porte, from Latin porta), hence a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town or city, or for the gatekeeper. Compare Porter 1.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a harbor or in a market town, from a homonymous Middle English port(e) (Old English port ‘harbor, market town’, from Latin portus ‘harbor, haven’, reinforced in Middle English by Old French port, from the same source).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Port‐en‐Bessin (Calvados), which is recorded as Portu in 1035–36. The placename derives from Latin portus ‘port, harbour, haven’.

variants.name: Fortner
meanings: German: variant (also Förtner) or Americanized form of Pförtner, an occupational name for the gatekeeper of a walled town or city, or the doorkeeper in a great house, castle, or monastery, Middle High German phortenaere (from Latin porta ‘door, gate’). Compare English Porter .

variants.name: Portmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Franz, Hansi, Kurt.

North German: occupational name for a gatekeeper, from Middle Low German port(e) ‘gate’ (from Latin porta) + man ‘man’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town. Compare Porter .

variants.name: Portier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Clovis, Leonce, Renauld.
French: occupational name for the gatekeeper of a walled town or city, or the doorkeeper of a great house, Old French portier (from Late Latin portarius). Compare English Porter .
History: Alexandre-Bernard Portier from Paris, France, married Catherine Monte in Edgard, LA, in 1741.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
The English began to arrive in 1636

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in the Memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When John Porter of Windsor Connecticut was born in June 1594, in Felsted, Essex, England, his father, John Porter, was 31 and his mother, Sybil Vessey, was 32. He married Anna White on 18 October 1620, in Messing, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America for about 9 years. In 1639, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as appointed constable in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 22 April 1648, in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Porter of Windsor Connecticut est né en juin 1594, à Felsted, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Porter, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sybil Vessey, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Anna White le 18 octobre 1620, à Messing, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Windsor, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 9 ans. En 1639, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est appointed constable à Windsor, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1648, à Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Porter of Windsor Connecticut im Juni 1594 in Felsted, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Porter 31 und seine Mutter Sybil Vessey 32. Er hat am 18. Oktober 1620 in Messing, Essex, England Anna White geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 9 Jahre lang in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1639, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als appointed constable in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. April 1648 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Porter of Windsor Connecticut è nato il nel giugno 1594 nel Felsted, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Porter, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Vessey, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Anna White il 18 ottobre 1620, nel Messing, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America per circa 9 anni. Nel 1639, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed constable nel Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 22 aprile 1648, nel Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Porter of Windsor Connecticutが1594年6月にイギリスエセックスフエルステドで生まれた時，父John Porterは31歳，母Sybil Vesseyは32歳であった。1620年10月18日にイギリスエセックスメシングでAnna Whiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドソルに約9年間住んでいた。1639年，47歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドソルでの職業はappointed constableと記録されている。彼は1648年4月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウィンドソルで53歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードセンター セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Porter of Windsor Connecticut(이)가 1594년 6월 영국 에세스 프스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Porter(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Vessey(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1620년 10월 18일 영국 에세스 메징에서 Anna White(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서 약 9년 동안 살았다. 1639년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서 appointed constable이었다. 그는 1648년 4월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 윈드소르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드 세터 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.Holy Cross Church, Felsted, Essex, Engla: Holy Cross Church, Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Porter of Windsor Connecticut nasceu em junho de 1594, em Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Porter, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Vessey, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna White em 18 de outubro de 1620, em Messing, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America por quase 9 anos. Em 1639, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed constable em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1648, em Windsor, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, B: виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Con: кентир кеметири, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Holy Cross Church, Felsted, Essex, Engla: холи кросс чурч, фелстед, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Porter of Windsor Connecticut родился июнь 1594 г. в местности фелстед, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Porter было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sybil Vessey, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna White 18 октября 1620 г. в местности мессинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика около 9 лет. В 1639 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии appointed constable в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 22 апреля 1648 г. в местности виндзор, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности кентир кеметири, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Porter of Windsor Connecticut nació en junio de 1594, en Felsted, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Porter, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sybil Vessey, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Anna White el 18 de octubre de 1620, en Messing, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 9 años. En 1639, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed constable en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 22 de abril de 1648, en Windsor, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Center Cemetery, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
